title: neocupressus bakeri
intro: Neocupressus bakeri, also known as the Baker's Cupressus, is a species of plant in the cypress family (Cupressaceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Neocupressus bakeri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe coughs and reduce fever. Neocupressus bakeri can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil for various medicinal and therapeutic uses.
